about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: RK Rent A Car — your local car rental in Sakarya, Adapazarı. Reliable, personal service.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: RK Rent A Car is a local rental business operating from our shop on Karakamış Street in Adapazarı, Sakarya. Unlike large chains, we know our customers by name, choose the right car together, and handle pickup and return transparently. Our goal is to offer a trustworthy, accessible and friendly rental experience across Sakarya and the surrounding region.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To provide safe, comfortable and hassle-free journeys with clean, well-maintained and insured vehicles in Sakarya and at Sabiha Gökçen Airport. We take reservations by phone or WhatsApp and finalize everything face to face.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To become the go-to car rental brand in Sakarya and the Marmara region — a symbol of local trust and quality service.

shop.title: Adapazarı Shop
shop.description: Visit our office in Tekeler district, see the fleet in person and meet our team.

airport.title: SAW Airport Delivery
airport.description: Your car ready at the door on arrival; easy return when you fly back.

fleet.title: 12-Vehicle Fleet
fleet.description: From economy to SUV — insured vehicles with regular maintenance and checks.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.description: Phone and WhatsApp always available; we're here if you need help on the road.

shop.title: Our Shop & Contact
shop.description: Visit RK Rent A Car in Adapazarı. Walk-ins welcome — inspect our fleet on site.

values.title: Our Values
values.qualityDesc: Every vehicle is cleaned and technically checked before handover.
values.trustDesc: Transparent pricing, written contracts and clear deposit refunds.
values.localDesc: A Sakarya-based business focused on solutions, not bureaucracy.
values.serviceDesc: The same team before and after rental — continuous communication.

cta.title: Rent a car in Sakarya — call us
